nodes.title: Harvest Hope Food Bank
nodes.heroSubtitle: Nourishing Our Community, One Meal at a Time

heroDescription.processed: Harvest Hope Food Bank works to end hunger in our community by providing nutritious food to families, children, and seniors in need. Through our network of pantries, programs, and dedicated volunteers, no one in our community goes hungry.
heroDescription.summary: Harvest Hope Food Bank works to end hunger in our community by providing nutritious food to families, children, and seniors in need. Through our network of pantries, programs, and dedicated volunteers

ctaDescription.processed: Every dollar donated provides 5 meals to families facing food insecurity. Together, we can ensure every person in our community has access to nutritious food.
ctaDescription.summary: Every dollar donated provides 5 meals to families facing food insecurity. Together, we can ensure every person in our community has access to nutritious food.
